title: 谷歌打造AI数学家，以48%称霸；
description: 谷歌DeepMind正式宣布“AI联合数学家”多智能体系统，在FrontierMath Tier 4自主模式下实现48%的准确率。
titleZh: 谷歌打造AI数学家，以48%称霸；
titleEn: Google Creates an AI Mathematician, Dominating with 48%; Oxford Professor Uses It to Crack a 60-Year Unsolved Mystery
descriptionZh: 谷歌DeepMind正式宣布“AI联合数学家”多智能体系统，在FrontierMath Tier 4自主模式下实现48%的准确率。
descriptionEn: Google DeepMind officially announced the "AI co-mathematician" multi-agent system, achieving a 48% accuracy rate in FrontierMath Tier 4 autonomous mode. An Oxford professor used the system to solve a long-standing open problem from the Kourovka Notebook, evolving AI into a true research partner for mathematicians.

title: Altman 亲自将 GPT-5.5 称为“自闭症天才”；
description: 奥特曼正式将 GPT-5.5 标记为“自闭症天才”。
titleZh: Altman 亲自将 GPT-5.5 称为“自闭症天才”；
titleEn: Altman Personally Dubs GPT-5.5 an "Autistic Genius"; 16-Person Team Cancels Claude Overnight
descriptionZh: 奥特曼正式将 GPT-5.5 标记为“自闭症天才”。
descriptionEn: Altman officially stamped GPT-5.5 as an "autistic genius." A 16-person team canceled Claude overnight and switched to GPT-5.5, saving $32,000 per month. Codex surged to 90 million downloads in a single week, crushing competitors by 12 times; the developer migration has begun.

title: 你应该用人工智能构建的不是一个大系统，而是这 5 个小流程

descriptionZh: 首先使其商业化，然后追求产品化。
descriptionEn: First make it business-ready, then pursue productization.

title: 不怕搞乱Excel公式，克劳德闯入微软整个套件，一句话运行四个Office应用
description: Claude 已正式登陆 Excel、PowerPoint 和 Word，Outlook 公测版同时推出。
titleZh: 不怕搞乱Excel公式，克劳德闯入微软整个套件，一句话运行四个Office应用
titleEn: Not afraid to mess up Excel formulas, Claude breaks into Microsoft's entire suite, running four Office apps with one sentence
descriptionZh: Claude 已正式登陆 Excel、PowerPoint 和 Word，Outlook 公测版同时推出。
descriptionEn: Claude has officially landed in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word, with Outlook public beta launching simultaneously. From Outlook to Word, Excel, and PPT, a single conversation runs through them all without losing context. The invisible costs of knowledge work—jumping between multiple windows and repeatedly explaining background—Anthropic aims to eliminate them directly.
